## Summary

- What changed:
- Why it changed:

## Scope

- [ ] Frontend (`auto-apply-frontend`)
- [ ] Backend (`auto-apply-backend`)
- [ ] Docs

## Validation

- [ ] `cd auto-apply-frontend && npm run test`
- [ ] `cd auto-apply-backend && npm run test`
- [ ] Manual smoke check completed (if UI/API behavior changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Documentation updated (if behavior/config changed)
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
- [ ] Screenshots added (for UI changes)
